raw_text: The Buyer shall pay the Seller for each kWh of Metered Energy delivered at the Tariff Rate specified in Schedule 1.
The Buyer shall pay each invoice within thirty (30) days of receipt. Late payments shall accrue interest at a rate of 2% per month.
The Seller shall ensure the System achieves a minimum annual Availability of ninety-five percent (95%), measured on a calendar year basis.
The Seller shall be responsible for all routine and preventive maintenance of the System in accordance with the manufacturer's recommended maintenance schedule.
An Event of Default shall occur if either Party fails to perform any material obligation under this Agreement and such failure continues for a period of thirty (30) days after written notice.
Either Party may terminate this Agreement upon the occurrence of an Event of Default by the other Party, subject to the cure period specified in Clause 8.

Neither Party shall be liable for failure to perform its obligations to the extent such failure is caused by a Force Majeure Event, including but not limited to acts of God, war, terrorism, epidemic, and government actions.
The Seller shall maintain comprehensive general liability insurance and property damage insurance covering the System for the duration of this Agreement.
